nasb.text: Therefore on that day he named him Jerubbaal, that is to say, “Let Baal contend against him,” because he had torn down his altar.

esv.text: Therefore on that day Gideon was called Jerubbaal, that is to say, “Let Baal contend against him,” because he broke down his altar.

cnv.text: 因此，當日基甸被稱為耶路．巴力，意思說：他拆毀了巴力的祭壇，讓巴力與他爭辯吧。

ccb.text: 因此，那天他们称基甸为耶路·巴力，意思是“让巴力为自己辩护”，因为他拆毁了巴力的祭坛。
